signalTitle: Easy day, a touch above easy
signalParagraphs: The run still helped the week, but it sat a little above the calm effort an easy day is supposed to protect.
With FILA Race getting closer, the main value now is keeping the easy days supportive enough for the more specific work to matter.
carryForward: Bring the next aerobic run back under control and let the effort settle lower.
nextRunSummary: Keep the effort below this session's cost and use it to restore rhythm before the next quality touch.
weekSummary: The week looks better when the harder work lands once and the easy volume stays easy enough to absorb it.
